overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting 18th century Paris. The player character walks through crowded cobblestone streets toward the Panthéon, navigating dense crowds of NPCs in period clothing. The scene transitions from a narrow street to a large open plaza in front of the neoclassical building with its distinctive dome and columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow historic cobblestone street with shops and wooden carts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone street toward the distant domed building, navigating between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in period dress walking past the camera carrying a basket
group of townspeople in 18th century clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: multi-story stone buildings with shuttered windows and shop fronts
weathered stone facades with wooden balconies and signage
large neoclassical building with prominent dome visible at the end of the street
wooden carts and barrels stacked along the left side of the street
colorful triangular flags strung across the street between buildings
uneven cobblestone road surface with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings. The player character walks forward through moderate crowds of NPCs in 18th century attire, with wooden carts and barrels visible along the sides. The Panthéon dome is visible in the distance at the end of the street, with hanging banners strung overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching the plaza in front of the columned building

events.description: exits narrow street into wider open plaza area with increased crowd density
slight adjustment to path to navigate through denser crowd while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly dense crowds approaching the columned facade of the large building

notable_agents.action: woman in long dress walking in the same direction toward the building
man in tricorn hat and coat walking briskly toward the plaza

entered.detail: stacked wooden barrels outside a shop entrance
stone steps leading up to building entrances on the left
wooden scaffolding structure against the left side buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow street to a wider plaza area. The crowd density increases significantly as the character approaches the Panthéon. Wooden scaffolding and stone steps become visible on the left, while the building's columned facade grows larger in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza directly in front of the neoclassical building with tall columns and inscription

events.description: slows to a stop in front of the building facade to look up at the inscription
turns around 180 degrees to face away from the building and survey the plaza

agents.ego_description: stops to look up at the building inscription, then turns around to observe the crowded plaza

notable_agents.action: dense crowd of townspeople milling about the plaza in various directions
soldiers in uniform standing guard near the building entrance

entered.detail: massive stone facade with tall Corinthian columns and triangular pediment
row of tall stone columns supporting the building portico
inscription reading AUX GRANDS HOMMES LA PATRIE RECONNAISSANTE on the building entablature
wooden platform structure with stairs on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front of the Panthéon, stopping to look up at the famous inscription above the columns. The plaza is packed with NPCs in period clothing. After pausing, the character turns around to face the crowd, revealing the full scope of the busy square and a wooden platform structure to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with execution scaffold and scattered market activity

events.description: begins walking away from the building through the crowd toward the scaffold structure

agents.ego_description: walking away from the building through the crowded plaza toward a wooden scaffold structure

notable_agents.action: woman in white cap and dark dress walking past the camera
crowd gathered near the wooden scaffold watching an event

entered.detail: open cobblestone plaza area with scattered hay and debris
large wooden scaffold structure with stairs and platform, possibly for executions
single leafy tree growing in the plaza to the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the Panthéon through the crowded plaza, moving toward a large wooden scaffold structure that dominates the center of the square. The building recedes to the left background as the character explores the open area, passing by a tree and various groups of NPCs gathered near the scaffold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, historic street that gradually opens into a bustling, expansive plaza dominated by the Panthéon. It begins by following a character through a cobblestone lane lined with stone buildings and wooden carts, moving beneath hanging banners toward the distant silhouette of a great dome. As the street widens, the crowd density increases and the view expands to reveal wooden scaffolding and the towering columned facade of the neoclassical building. The camera then pauses at the building's entrance to look up at the inscription before turning around to face the full scope of the packed square. Finally, the character walks away from the Panthéon, leaving the building to recede into the background while moving toward a large wooden scaffold structure in the center of the open plaza.
